nodes.name: Daily 10am Trigger
nodes.notes: Runs every day at 10:00 AM server time. Adjust cron expression as needed.

nodes.name: Run Pipeline Script
nodes.notes: Executes the full Python pipeline. Outputs JSON result to stdout.

nodes.name: Notify Success (Telegram)
nodes.notes: Configure your Telegram bot credentials in n8n. Set TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID in n8n variables.

nodes.name: Notify Error (Telegram)
nodes.notes: Same bot, different message. You'll know immediately if something breaks.
